operations.reason: Kept the opening tutorial content after removing the black leader at the start.
Removed a frozen/repeated screenshot section and the trailing dead air/black tail while preserving the tutorial's original order.
Standardized the export to 1280x720 square-pixel MP4 and normalized speech loudness without clipping.

checks_performed: ffprobe submit/output.mp4 confirmed H.264 video, AAC audio, 1280x720, SAR 1:1, 30 fps, duration 92.6 s
ffmpeg volumedetect on submit/output.mp4 reported mean_volume -21.5 dB and max_volume -0.6 dB
ffmpeg blackdetect on submit/output.mp4 returned no black spans
ffmpeg freezedetect on submit/output.mp4 returned no frozen spans
ffmpeg silencedetect on submit/output.mp4 showed only natural pauses, with the intended dead-air and static-shot sections removed
sampled output frames across the timeline to confirm the tutorial content remains in original order
